---
title: "Sports Data Analysis and Visualization"
format: 
  html:
    lightbox: true
toc: true
---

# 1. Static Visualizations

## 2023

### A. Relationship between the average player value (Euros) and FIFA rankings (2023)

:::: grid

::: g-col-4
![Fig. 1: Analysis of the relationship between average player value (Euros) and FIFA ranking. Data Source: transfermarkt \| FIFA](../../research/research_interests/sports_data_visualization/fifa_ranking_avg_player_values_2023/1.png)
:::

::::


### B. East vs West: Analysis of FIFA Ranking and Player Values in Africa (2023)

:::::: grid
::: g-col-4
![Fig. 1: Average player value is correlated with FIFA ranking in East and West Africa. Data Source: transfermarkt \| FIFA](../../research/research_interests/sports_data_visualization/east_west_fifa_ranking_avg_player_values_2023/1.png){group="my-gallery"}
:::

::: g-col-4
![Fig. 2: Top player market value is correlated with FIFA ranking. Data Source: transfermarkt \| FIFA](../../research/research_interests/sports_data_visualization/east_west_fifa_ranking_avg_player_values_2023/2.png){group="my-gallery"}
:::

::: g-col-4
![Fig. 3: Top players in West Africa have higher market values compared to East Africa. Data Source: transfermarkt](../../research/research_interests/sports_data_visualization/east_west_fifa_ranking_avg_player_values_2023/3.png){group="my-gallery"}
:::
::::::

## 2025

### C. Best\* Season for Selected African Players in Top 5 European Leagues (2025)

**\*Best = highest goals (minus penalty kicks) + assists**

::::::: grid
::: g-col-4
![Fig. 1: Best Season for Selected African Players in Top 5 European Leagues (1990-2000).](../../research/research_interests/sports_data_visualization/best_season_af_football_players_top_5_euro_2025/1.png){group="my-gallery2"}
:::

::: g-col-4
![Fig. 2: Best Season for Selected African Players in Top 5 European Leagues (2000-2010).](../../research/research_interests/sports_data_visualization/best_season_af_football_players_top_5_euro_2025/2.png){group="my-gallery2"}
:::

::: g-col-4
![Fig. 3: Best Season for Selected African Players in Top 5 European Leagues (2010-2020).](../../research/research_interests/sports_data_visualization/best_season_af_football_players_top_5_euro_2025/3.png){group="my-gallery2"}
:::

::: g-col-4
![Fig. 4: Best Season for Selected African Players in Top 5 European Leagues (2020-2025).](../../research/research_interests/sports_data_visualization/best_season_af_football_players_top_5_euro_2025/4.png){group="my-gallery2"}
:::
:::::::


### D. African Football Players in the Top 5 European Leagues (2025)

:::::::: grid
::: g-col-4
![Fig. 1: Number of minutes played by Africans in Top 5 European Leagues](../../research/research_interests/sports_data_visualization/af_football_players_top_5_euro_2025/1.png){group="my-gallery3"}
:::

::: g-col-4
![Fig. 2: Number of Africans playing in the Top 5 European Leagues](../../research/research_interests/sports_data_visualization/af_football_players_top_5_euro_2025/2.png){group="my-gallery3"}
:::

::: g-col-4
![Fig. 3: Number of minutes played per African player in Top 5 European Leagues](../../research/research_interests/sports_data_visualization/af_football_players_top_5_euro_2025/3.png){group="my-gallery3"}
:::
::::::::

## 2026

### E. Africa at the World Cup (2026)

:::::::: grid
::: g-col-4
![Fig. 1: Relationship between FIFA Ranking Points and Elo Rating. Data Source: FIFA | Elo](../../research/research_interests/sports_data_visualization/africa_wc_2026/1.png){group="my-gallery4"}
:::

::: g-col-4
![Fig. 2: Percentage of Foreign-Based Players. Data Source: transfermarkt](../../research/research_interests/sports_data_visualization/africa_wc_2026/2.png){group="my-gallery4"}
:::

::: g-col-4
![Fig. 3: Team Market Value (Euros) for African World Cup Teams. Data Source: transfermarkt](../../research/research_interests/sports_data_visualization/africa_wc_2026/3.png){group="my-gallery4"}
:::

::: g-col-4
![Fig. 4: Relationship between Team Market Value (Euros) and FIFA Ranking Points. Data Source: transfermarkt | FIFA](../../research/research_interests/sports_data_visualization/africa_wc_2026/4.png){group="my-gallery4"}
:::
::::::::


### F. Women's Africa Cup of Nations (2026)

:::::::: grid
::: g-col-4
![Fig. 1: FIFA Ranking for teams participating in the 2026 Women's Africa. Data Source: FIFA ](../../research/research_interests/sports_data_visualization/wafcon_2026/1.png){group="my-gallery4"}
:::

::: g-col-4
![Fig. 2: Relationship between GDP per Capita ($) and FIFA Ranking Points. Data Source: worldometer | FIFA ](../../research/research_interests/sports_data_visualization/wafcon_2026/2.png){group="my-gallery4"}
:::

::: g-col-4
![Fig. 3: Relationship between Percentage of Women in the Labor Force and FIFA Ranking Points. Data Source: World Bank | FIFA ](../../research/research_interests/sports_data_visualization/wafcon_2026/3.png){group="my-gallery4"}
:::

::::::::

# 2. Data Dashboards

### A: African Football Legends (1990 - Present)

<iframe src="https://african-football-legends.streamlit.app/?embed=true" style="height: 450px; width: 100%;">

</iframe>

[Link to App](https://african-football-legends.streamlit.app)
